Perf Check: Blog card images WebP lazy; LCP < 2.5s; pagination no CLS
SEO Check: Title: Blog - CloudBasket; meta desc; H1; Schema:Blog; OG; Sitemap; paginated canonicals
A11y Check: Article cards accessible; read-more links descriptive (not just 'Read More'); keyboard nav
Security Check: No forms — low risk; external links noopener
Content Check: Posts have title/date/author/category; no draft posts published; content accurate; no copyright violations
Functional Check: Category filter works; card click → blog post; pagination works; RSS link if present
Notes: Check for duplicate content if blog posts are also syndicated elsewhere

Perf Check: LCP (hero image) < 2.5s; article images lazy; reading time estimate shown
SEO Check: Schema:Article with author+date+headline; title = post title; meta desc = excerpt; OG=post image; canonical per slug; BreadcrumbList
A11y Check: Article heading hierarchy H1>H2>H3; img alts within article; readable font; reading progress accessible
Security Check: No user input in basic post; related post links validated; no external script injection
Content Check: Author correct; date accurate; content factual; internal links not broken; affiliate links disclosed; no outdated prices quoted
Functional Check: Share buttons fire correctly; related posts links work; invalid slug → 404 not crash; author profile link works if present
Notes: ⚠️ Check generateStaticParams(); test invalid slug — must return 404 not 500
